sentence: 消费者越来越注重产品质量。
pinyin: Xiāofèizhě yuè lái yuè zhùzhòng chǎnpǐn zhìliàng.
english: Consumers are paying more and more attention to product quality.

sentence: 爷爷每天早上都要看日报。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān zǎoshang dōu yào kàn rìbào.
english: Grandpa reads the daily newspaper every morning.

sentence: 他平时很忙，周末更是抽不出时间。
pinyin: Tā píngshí hěn máng, zhōumò gèng shì chōu bu chū shíjiān.
english: He is usually very busy, and on weekends he has even less time to spare.

sentence: 路口禁止大型车辆通行。
pinyin: Lù kǒu jìn zhǐ dà xíng chē liàng tōng xíng.
english: Large vehicles are prohibited from passing through the intersection.

meaning: 1. to supply; 2. to provide; 3. to offer
sentence: 今年蔬菜供应充足，价格比较稳定。
pinyin: Jīnnián shūcài gōng yìng chōngzú, jiàgé bǐjiào wěndìng.
english: This year the vegetable supply is plentiful and prices are fairly stable.
